name: Roasted Pork Loin
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. Rub the pork loin roast with bone generously with olive oil.
3. In a bowl, combine garlic salt, salt, black pepper, paprika, and dry mustard. Mix well.
4. Rub the seasoning mixture all over the pork loin roast.
5. Place the roast on a rack in a roasting pan.
6. Roast at 400°F (200°C) for 45 minutes.
7. Reduce temperature to 350°F (175°C) and continue roasting for an additional 60 minutes, or until the internal temperature reaches 145°F (63°C).
8. Remove the roast from the oven and let it rest for 15-30 minutes.
9. Meanwhile, heat the fruit glaze in a saucepan over low heat.
10. Carve the roast into thin slices.
11. Arrange the slices on a warmed platter.
12. Drizzle with the heated glaze.
13. Serve hot.
